title: Commission with managed assets but no ResolverDriver wired fails-fast with resolver_not_configured
description: v0.1-conforming agents are expected to honor managed assets when given a wired resolver. When AVP_RESOLVER_URL is unset (or, equivalently, no ResolverDriver was supplied to AVPAgent) and the Commission carries managed assets, the agent MUST emit error_occurred(resolver_not_configured) and agent_stopped(reason=error) before any model turn. The case sets `omit_resolver: true` so the harness skips wiring the in-process ScriptedResolver.

forbidden_events.label: no model turn runs when no resolver is wired
no managed_ref_resolved fires without a resolver
